# Form Blends

> Form Blends is a physician-supervised telehealth clinic specializing in GLP-1 weight loss medications (semaglutide, tirzepatide) and therapeutic peptides. We provide medical consultations, prescriptions, and ongoing care through a secure telehealth platform.

## Main Sections

- [GLP-1 Weight Loss](/glp1): Semaglutide and tirzepatide programs with physician oversight
- [Products](/products): Full catalog of pharmaceutical-grade peptides
- [Science](/science): Clinical research backing our treatments
- [Articles](/articles): 8,000+ evidence-based health articles

## Article Categories

- [GLP-1 Articles](/articles/glp1-hub): Semaglutide, tirzepatide, Wegovy, Ozempic guides (2,100+ articles)
- [Peptide Therapy](/articles/peptide-hub): BPC-157, TB-500, GHK-Cu, and 20+ peptides (1,800+ articles)
- [Provider Comparisons](/articles/comparison-hub): Side-by-side reviews of telehealth weight loss programs (800+ articles)
- [Telehealth by City](/articles/local-seo): City-specific weight loss and peptide therapy availability (1,100+ articles)
- [Retatrutide](/articles/retatrutide-hub): Eli Lilly's triple agonist clinical trials and research (500+ articles)
- [Quick Answers](/articles/aeo-hub): Fast answers to common GLP-1 and peptide questions (1,000+ articles)
- [Lifestyle & Wellness](/articles/lifestyle-hub): Nutrition, exercise, and health optimization (480+ articles)
- [Biohacking](/articles/biohacking-hub): Mitochondrial health, CGMs, supplements, longevity (300+ articles)

## Key Topics

- Semaglutide for weight loss: dosing, side effects, results, costs
- Tirzepatide for weight loss: Mounjaro, Zepbound, comparisons
- Retatrutide: triple agonist mechanism, clinical trial results, FDA timeline
- Peptide therapy: BPC-157 for healing, GHK-Cu for skin, CJC-1295 for growth hormone
- Telehealth weight loss: online prescriptions, provider comparisons, insurance coverage
- GLP-1 side effects: nausea management, hair loss, muscle preservation

## About Form Blends

- Licensed physicians prescribe all medications after individual medical evaluation
- Telehealth consultations available nationwide
- Medications ship directly to patients with temperature-controlled packaging
- Ongoing medical oversight with dose adjustments and follow-up care

- [Full article index](/llms-full.txt): Complete listing of all 8,000+ articles with descriptions
